description: The RefEditor component is used internally by inspectors to show the human readable name of any IWorldElement. Whenever you are looking at a field and see a text like "Enabled on ObjectRoot on ComponentHolder", that description is generated by this component. This can be used to identify fields in the process of Ref Hacking which is one of the Things to Avoid

fields._targetRef: The reference to generate a short description for
fields._textDrive: The text to fill with the short description of ``_targetRef``
fields._button: The button that allows for setting the field of ``_targetRef`` when clicked.

methods.RemovePressed: Called when the removed button is touched.
methods.OpenInspectorButton: Called when the open inspector button is touched.
methods.OpenWorkerInspectorButton: Called when the open worker inspector (single component inspector) button is touched.
methods.SetReference: Called when the set reference button is touched.

usage: Button is not required for the ``_textDrive`` to fill with the description of ``_targetRef``
